title: Mexican Poached Dates
description: A sweet and unique Mexican dessert featuring poached dates. The chewy texture of the dates is enhanced by the spicy flavors of the Mexican spices.
instructions: Combine the water, sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon and ground cloves in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the dates to the saucepan and poach for 10-12 minutes, or until they are tender.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let the dates cool in the liquid for 10 minutes.
Serve the poached dates warm or at room temperature.
